workflow_name: Grant Database Privileges to a User

steps.description: Type option 1 to select DB2 system catalog on the DB2 Admin main menu
Press Enter to navigate to the System Catalog Objects screen
Type option D to select Databases on the System Catalog Objects screen
Type the database name or partial name in the Name filter field to locate the target database
Press Enter to display the matching Databases list
Type the A line command in the Select field next to the target database to open its authorization list
Press Enter to open the Database Authorizations screen
Type the GR line command in the Sel field next to an existing authorization entry for the target database to open the Grant Database Privileges form
Press Enter to open the Grant Database Privileges form pre-populated with the selected database name and privilege settings
Type the user ID to receive the granted privileges in the TO field, replacing any pre-populated value
Press Enter to submit the grant request and display the Change Management prompt
Type No in the Change Management prompt to skip change management and execute the GRANT statement immediately
Press Enter to confirm the choice and execute the GRANT statement
Press PF3 to return to the Database Authorizations list, where the new grant entry is now visible
Press PF3 to return to the Databases list
